scenario.name: CRM Pipeline
scenario.task_text:
Parse the JSON customer data. Filter to only active customers (status = "active").
Calculate: total number of active customers (active_count), sum of their monthly_revenue
(total_active_revenue), and average revenue per active customer (avg_active_revenue).

bricks.raw_response:
name: active_customer_summary
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 5 steps
inputs:
  raw_api_response: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_extract_json_from_str
  brick: extract_json_from_str
  params:
    text: ${inputs.raw_api_response}
  save_as: step_1_extract_json_from_str
- name: step_2_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_1_extract_json_from_str.result}
    key: status
    value: active
  save_as: step_2_filter_dict_list
- name: step_3_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_2_filter_dict_list.result}
    field: monthly_revenue
    operation: sum
  save_as: step_3_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_4_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_2_filter_dict_list.result}
    field: monthly_revenue
    operation: avg
  save_as: step_4_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_5_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_2_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_5_count_dict_list
outputs_map:
  active_count: ${step_5_count_dict_list.result}
  total_active_revenue: ${step_3_calculate_aggregates.result}
  avg_active_revenue: ${step_4_calculate_aggregates.result}
